title: To you, on your birthday
body:
Happy Birthday, birthday boy! ❤️🥳

First of all... welcome to being one year older. 😛 I was going to make an age joke, but I'll be nice today since it's your birthday.

I really wish I could celebrate this day with you, but since I can't, I thought I'd put together this little something for you.

I hope you eat lots of good food today, cut a nice cake, get spoiled a little (I wish I could spoil you too ❤️), and don't think about work for at least one day. Just enjoy the day and let people celebrate you.

I hope, whenever you read the rest of these letters, they make you smile, remind you of a few memories, and maybe even make you laugh a little.

Happy Birthday once again. I hope you have the happiest day. ❤️

title: If you ever doubt yourself
preview: Read me on a hard day
body:
I want you to always remember that you are one of the strongest people I know.

The way you handle every situation with so much patience and grace is something I truly admire. I know you go through a lot sometimes, but you have always managed to get through things with your own strength, and I know you can do that every time.

But also remember that you don't always have to handle everything alone. If you ever need someone beside you, I will always be there. Even if you don't want to share what's on your mind, just call me. We can talk about absolutely nothing, laugh about random things, and I'll do my best to make your day a little lighter.

And if you don't feel like talking at all, that's okay too. I’ll still be there — just to sit with you, hug you, and remind you that you don't have to face every moment alone.

title: A small confession
body:
A small confession — I really love you.

You have become that person I naturally run to, whether it's to share something exciting, something silly, a bad day, or just a random thought. You are the first person I think of in the morning and one of my last thoughts at night.

You have been the calm to my chaos. Since the day we landed back in Bangalore, you've handled all my little worries, problems, and moments with so much patience.

Thank you for being the person you are. Thank you for giving me some of the best memories of my life, for all the laughter, comfort, and little moments we shared.

And thank you for letting me be a small part of your journey. ❤️

title: I See You
preview: For the days you need this
body:
I don't know if you hear this enough, but I hope you always know that I truly see you.

When I look at you, I don't just see the man I love. I see someone who is incredibly strong, patient, and kind. I see someone who carries more than most people realize, yet still finds a way to show up for the people he cares about.

I notice how hard you work, the effort you put into everything you do, and the quiet ways you care for others. Those are the things that make me admire you the most—not the big achievements, but the person you choose to be every single day.

I know there will be days when life feels overwhelming, when you question yourself, or when everything seems heavier than usual. On those days, I hope you remember that someone once saw just how capable, resilient, and wonderful you are. I hope you remember that you've made it through every difficult chapter before, and you'll make it through the next one too.

Please don't be too hard on yourself. Rest when you need to. Ask for help when you need it. You don't have to have everything figured out all the time.

Most of all, I hope you never forget how deeply you are appreciated—not just for what you do, but for who you are. You have a heart that makes people feel safe, a patience that comforts others, and a strength that inspires more than you probably realize.

I believe in you. I always will. And no matter where life takes you, I hope you never stop believing in yourself, because you are so much more amazing than you give yourself credit for.

You mean more than you know. ❤️

title: Thank you
body:
Thank you.

For every conversation that made a bad day better.

For every laugh that came at exactly the right time.

For every memory we've made.

For your patience.

For your kindness.

For making me feel understood.

For simply being you.

Some people leave behind memories.

You gave me moments that became a part of me.

And for that, I'll always be grateful.
